division_title: SENTENCING FOR DRIVING WHILE UNDER THE INFLUENCE
text:
(a) Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23152 or 23153 who is required to participate in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program shall participate in that program.

(b) Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23103, as specified in Section 23103.5, in a judicial district that participates in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program pursuant to this article, may be ordered to participate in the program.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11.5. SENTENCING FOR DRIVING WHILE UNDER THE INFLUENCE [23500 - 23675]
### Chapter 4. Procedures [23610 - 23675]
#### Article 6. Alcohol Assessment [23645 - 23650]
##### § 23647

(a) Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23152 or 23153 who is required to participate in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program shall participate in that program.

(b) Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23103, as specified in Section 23103.5, in a judicial district that participates in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program pursuant to this article, may be ordered to participate in the program.

*(Added by renumbering Section 23249.53 by Stats. 1999, Ch. 22, Sec. 30. Effective May 26, 1999. Operative July 1, 1999, by Sec. 46 of Ch. 22.)*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23152 or 23153 who is required to participate in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program shall participate in that program.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Any person convicted of a violation of Section 23103, as specified in Section 23103.5, in a judicial district that participates in a county alcohol and drug problem assessment program pursuant to this article, may be ordered to participate in the program.
